_comment: Vermilion Bird Dynasty Capital (朱雀王朝皇都) — the political capital of the Vermilion Bird Dynasty that rules Planet Suzaku (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md — Vermilion Bird Country). Opulent imperial city, seat of the Vermilion Bird Dynastic court. Stand-in: plains village (imperial scale). Final: imperial palace complex, vermilion-spar gates, dynastic ancestor temples, fire-aspect spirit vein beneath the throne hall.
